name: Persona-as-Configuration: Generative Stakeholder Reporting for Agricultural Floods

description: arXiv:2607.17774v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Cyber-physical systems built on deterministic edge inference, such as on-vehicle flood detection for agricultural fields, produce structured decision logs that must be interpreted differently by heterogeneous stakeholders. Pairing such systems with large language models (LLMs) to generate stakeholder-specific reports introduces a tension: the ge...
author: Oliver Aleksander Larsen, Tiziano Santilli, Francesco Daghero, Mahyar T. Moghaddam
